mapper.sql: award_id, contest_id, award_name, award_level, description, quota, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_contest_award where award_id = #{awardId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_contest_award where contest_id = #{contestId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, award_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_contest_award set award_name = #{entity.awardName}, award_level = #{entity.awardLevel}, description = #{entity.description}, quota = #{entity.quota}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where award_id = #{entity.awardId} and del_flag = '0'
